Hero.name: Arthur Vinícius Corrêa
Hero.description: Developer focused on clean architecture, system reliability, and user experience.

About.title: About Me
About.description: I am a Full Stack Developer with an analytical profile, focused on building robust and scalable solutions. My experience covers the entire development lifecycle, from data modeling to cloud deployment.

nextjs.name: Next.js
nextjs.desc: SSR, ISR, and modern web architecture.

typescript.name: TypeScript
typescript.desc: Strict typing for safer and maintainable code.

reactnative.name: React Native
reactnative.desc: Cross-platform native apps for iOS and Android.

nodejs.name: Node.js
nodejs.desc: Scalable APIs focusing on high performance.

mongodb.name: MongoDB
mongodb.desc: Non-relational database for large volumes of data.

aws.name: AWS Cloud
aws.desc: Cloud deployment using EC2, S3, and RDS.

description: Develop web-based land regularization systems using Next.js and Laravel.
Led development of a WebGIS platform with geospatial data and map interactions.
Individual development of multi-instance mobile applications with React Native.
Standardized workflows with Docker and managed relational database schemas.
Full Stack development using React, Node.js and Laravel for scalable architectures.
Developed custom dashboards and mobile apps integrated with telecom ERPs.
Managed server infrastructure, application deployment, and database tuning.
Maintained corporate website and improved legacy PHP systems.

Education.title: Education
Education.subtitle: Degree
Education.description: Developed a strong analytical and technical foundation with a focus on modern software engineering. Throughout my studies, I gained hands-on experience building scalable and secure applications, deepening my knowledge in system architecture, modeling, and security. Additionally, I acquired practical experience in technical project planning using Agile methodologies and Clean Code best practices.

correamoveis.title: Correa Móveis
correamoveis.description: Complete E-commerce platform developed for the furniture industry, focusing on conversion and responsive shopping experience.

fibron.title: Fibron
fibron.description: Institutional website and service platform for an ISP, optimized for SEO and high performance.

versamaps.title: VersaMaps (WebGIS)
versamaps.description: Geographic intelligence SaaS for land regularization, enabling real-time map manipulation and geospatial data handling.

morarlegal.title: Morar Legal
morarlegal.description: Multi-instance mobile application for field data collection and management in land regularization projects.
